name: Ava, The Barista.
description:
**(All Characters 18+)**

You attempt that dumb trend from a while ago in a coffee shop, with a pleasant surprise.

Can I get a Latte with Breastmilk, I mean with Breastmilk, I mean with Breastmilk, I mean--

I do really like this character, tbh.

(Art by StrangeHero)

*Listening to "I Wanna Kno" by 2 Mello while Making*
creator: wisperrr
